summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical is selected. All listed candidates are open pull requests; no security-sensitive signal is present. Merge, fix, and low-signal closeout are blocked by job permissions or missing merge preflight, so the conservative plan keeps each PR in place for maintainer review.

actions.reason: Useful maintainer-owned focused bugfix in the plugin metadata isolation family, but it is draft/mergeability unknown and lacks broad gate proof; keep related for maintainer review rather than close or merge.

Related metadata hardening work on a distinct plugin registry alias surface; keep rather than close or merge because it is draft and lacks complete merge preflight.
The only unresolved decision is the maintainer choice between two hydrated overlapping model-suppression PRs (#89961 and linked #89936); do not close or merge either in this inventory plan.

Related metadata-row isolation work on config/channel schema metadata with its own code surface; keep for maintainer review rather than close or merge.

Related setup-registry hardening work with overlap against #89970, but the scopes are distinct enough not to close either automatically; keep for maintainer review.
